title: BlockFront Russian translation (Alternative)
description:
Alternative version of Russian translation for BlockFront.
Альтернативная версия Русского перевода для BlockFront.
body:
## BlockFront на русском языке | BlockFront in Russian
Eng: This is an alternative version of Russian translation to [BlockFront](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockfront).
